summary: Monthly dependency pass on fl-admin-portal (chore/deps-2026-07, base dev). Only one Dependabot PR fell in the safe/minor lane: @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin 8.63.0 -> 8.64.0 (devDependency, root package.json — this repo's ESLint config lives at the monorepo root, not inside web-react-ts). Merged cleanly as a fast-forward with no conflicts. Applied in-range lockfile drift via `npm update` at both the root and in web-react-ts (transitive Babel/Vite-toolchain patch/minor bumps only, no direct dependency version changes). Verified the bumped plugin resolves and loads all 40 @typescript-eslint rules under the root .eslintrc.json, and confirmed the web-react-ts lane is still green end-to-end: tsc --noEmit clean, vite build succeeds, and the PWA service worker/precache manifest still generates. No security advisories were closed by this pass. Three PRs are majors and were left untouched for a human to schedule: @babel/core 7->8 in api/ (#550), a grouped npm_and_yarn major bump across 6 directories (#542), and @vitejs/plugin-react 4->6 in web-react-ts (#537) — the last one is worth prioritizing since it touches the app's PWA/Vite build pipeline directly.
